arts.ttl: Chris Wilder takes long-term view as Leeds United have chance to take Championship lead
arts.sum: First-half goals from Andre Brooks and Karlan Grant meant the points were shared, and moved the Blades to the top of the Championship table ahead of Leeds United's game with Derby County this evening. "We have to win but today what I learnt about my team was so pleasing," he said.

arts.ttl: Famous music star talks about her Leeds United love and experiencing those big Champions League nights
arts.sum: Emma-Jean Thackray, 35, who has recently released new track Black Hole, with Reggie Watts, has spoken to the BBC about how important Leeds United is to her. A famous Leeds United fan has opened up on her time growing up as a supporter and experiencing those famous Champions League nights at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Team news: Leeds squad confirmed v Derby County
arts.sum: Leeds team news pre-Derby: Wöber struggles, Byram and Ampadu checks Leeds put their recent struggles away from home to one side at the Bet365 Stadium to cruise to victory against the Potters, and will be hoping to do the same at Pride Park today.

arts.ttl: Former Leeds United star feels club will part ways with 28-year-old in 2025
arts.sum: Leeds United are unlikely to offer Junior Firpo a new contract at the club. According to former England international Paul Robinson, the 28-year-old is unlikely to get his contract extended. He added that there would have been discussions between the two parties regarding an extension if Leeds wanted to keep him at the club for […] The post Former Leeds United star feels club will part ways with 28-year-old in 2025 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leeds United eyeing Ch’ship’s most expensive ever player, agent aware of interest
arts.sum: Leeds United are said to be keen on signing Burnley outcast Mike Tresor in the January window, having joined the Clarets permanently in the summer and not played a minute since. Journalist Alan Nixon has revealed on his Patreon account that Leeds are keeping tabs on Burnley attacker Mike Tresor ahead of the January window.

arts.ttl: Leeds United sent Joe Gelhardt transfer reminder amid Wrexham talk as January window beckons
arts.sum: “I can’t imagine Joe Gelhardt leaving Leeds United and wanting to go and play in League One, although Wrexham are near the top of the league. Carlton Palmer is urging Leeds United manager Daniel Farke to allow Joe Gelhardt to leave Elland Road in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Forgotten Burnley man’s representatives hold Leeds United transfer belief, sale possible
arts.sum: Burnley winger Mike Tresor’s camp believe Leeds United want to sign him, reporter Alan Nixon has said on… The post Forgotten Burnley man’s representatives hold Leeds United transfer belief, sale possible appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer chance emerges as Derby County 'keen' to sign player who wowed Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Danns junior, a striker, has yet to make a senior appearance for Arne Slot's Premier League table-toppers - having made five outings in the previous campaign which included a two-goal showing against Southampton in the FA Cup. It was after that game that Slot's predecessor, Jurgen Klopp, praised Danns for scoring a superb chipped finish to open his account for the Reds before following-up on a rebound to double his tally. Danns, whose Reds team-mate Nat Phillips is already on loan at the Rams, would add another option up front to Paul Warne's squad if indeed he does sign for the club.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder snaps at 'ridiculous' Championship question involving Leeds United and Burnley
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community The Blades surrendered top spot to Leeds United on Boxing Day after losing to Burnley at Bramall Lane.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne: I’m confident Derby can beat Leeds United
arts.sum: Derby County boss Paul Warne is feeling confident of his side’s chances of picking up another scalp this week at Pride Park as Leeds United face the Rams. Warne has previewed the Leeds clash this week, in which he has discussed how confident he’s feeling of seeing off the Whites and collecting another impressive scalp after a 2-1 victory over West Brom most recently.
